title: Wavy Chevron Dishclothby Jenny Konopinski
description: Save when you buy a project bundle! Striped or solid, the crocheted chevron is a classic pattern that works up quickly and is easy to memorize - the perfect recipe for a satisfying dishcloth. The chevron pattern also builds on the beginning crocheter's skill set with double crochets, increases, and decreases. With 3 skeins of Dishie, this pattern will make two dish towels (10" wide x 15" long) and two Dishcloths (8.5" square).  Mix and match your favorite colors to create a custom set for your kitchen!
Sizes Included: Bright Colorway, Cabin Colorway, Candy Colorway

title: Filet Crochet Market Bagby Sara Dudek
description: Make a stunning market bag for trips to the farmers' market, outings to the beach, or to carry a few project bags worth of crochet goodies. You'll want to take this customizable bag everywhere! Practice the filet crochet technique with this mesh bag. Create patterns in the shape of a heart, a flower, a chevron pattern, or create a chart all your own. You will be a filet crochet expert by the time you finish this fast and fun market bag. Grab a project bundle and save!

title: Good Earth Blanketby Pattern Hut
description: Get cozy in color with a striped crochet blanket! Made in the popular Larksfoot pattern, the fully reversible fabric works up quickly in double crochet. To customize the blanket, the pattern is offered in three sizes: lapghan, throw, and afghan. Blanket is worked flat from the bottom up. Grab a project bundle and save on the yarn!
Sizes Included: 35.75 x 48" - spring picnic, 48.25 x 60" - spring picnic, 54 x 72" - spring picnic, 35.75 x 48" - winter holiday, 48.25 x 60" - winter holiday, 54 x 72" - winter holiday

title: Aberdeen Pulloverby Moon Elderidge
description: Bold and modern the geometric mosaic pattern on this pullover was inspired by Northern European style Fair Isle knitting patterns. Featuring simple shaping and easy double crochet stitches and incorporating clever post stitches to create the mosaic design, this sweater is a great skill-building project. The body is worked in turned rounds from the bottom up. The sleeves are worked separately and seamed in place. The mosaic pattern is both written and charted.
Sizes Included: 38.5" finished chest, 42.75" finished chest, 47" finished chest, 51.25" finished chest, 55.5" finished chest, 59.75" finished chest, 64" finished chest, 68.25" finished chest, 72.5" finished chest

title: Adventure Time Blanketby Amy Polcyn Niezur
description: Playful vehicles set off for adventure on this easy intarsia baby blanket. Simple motifs worked in single crochet are easy enough for a beginner, and the squares are worked individually to make it a great take-along project.

title: African Violet Afghanby Kristen Clay
description: A lightly textured 6-petal flower makes the center of each motif, which is then framed in a pretty border. The motifs join to create a lacy floral accent with just the right amount of interest and simplicity. Basic stitches combine with a few more unusual ones, making these two-color motifs work up quickly. They join as you go just follow the simple chart to know which join to and one round of pretty edging finishes it easily.

title: Alice Bunnyby Handmade with Chrissy
description: Stitch up this adorable bunny for a quick gift or cuddly friend! Worked primarily in continuous rounds of single crochet with bulky weight yarn or two strands of worsted weight yarn held together, this little one is a quick stitch with just the right amount of size and snuggle. Complete that irresistible face with plastic safety eyes as shown or embroider the eyes to make this a perfect gift for a new baby.
Sizes Included: 7" High x 7" Wide x 6" Deep - Bulky weight, 7" High x 7" Wide x 6" Deep - Worsted Weight

title: All About Shapes Baby Bath Setby Kristen Clay
description: A baby gift that is practical as well as cute, this bath set whips up in a jiffy using soft and absorbent cotton yarn. It’s made of primary shapes; adapt the colors to suit the receiver! Only a few of the most basic stitches make up this set, so it’s beginner friendly. The textured border is worked at the same time as the rest of the towel. Appliques are optional - or add your own.

title: Allegro Apron Topby Kate Miller
description: This lacy box top with a bateau neckline and ties at the sides gives just-so coverage for sunny days, and reveals cool confidence for hot summer nights. This apron top is constructed with rectangular panels of drapey Tunisian lace, joined down the center back and front, and at the shoulders.
Sizes Included: 27" finished chest measurement, 30" finished chest measurement, 33" finished chest measurement, 36" finished chest measurement, 39" finished chest measurement, 42" finished chest measurement, 45" finished chest measurement, 48" finished chest measurement, 51" finished chest measurement, 54" finished chest measurement, 57"  finished chest measurement
Needle / Hook Sizes: G/4.0mm crochet hook, G/4.0mm Tunisian crochet hook

title: Alpine Stitch Dishclothby Regan Nishikawa
description: The Alpine Stitch creates a nubby, textured dishcloth that is great for adding extra scrubbing power. Alpine stitch is made of a simple repeat that you will memorize quickly, which means it's a great project to work on while you're watching movies or your mind is otherwise occupied.

title: Amigurumi Crochet Cupcakeby The Itsy Bitsy Spider
description: It's impossible to say "no" to a cupcake - especially when these adorable sweets come with a 100 percent guilt free guarantee! This simple pattern is a great way to get started with amigurumi (the Japanese art of knitting or crocheting small stuffed animals and anthropomorphic creatures) because it uses basic shaping and can be customized over and over again. Before you know it, you'll be making these cuddly cupcakes for baby showers, office gifts, friends who could use a pick-me-up, and more. So let's get to baking... eh-hem, I mean crocheting shall we? Also, check out all of The Itsy Bitsy Spider IDP patterns right here.

title: Ancel Wrapby Arica Presinal
description: Looking for a fun fall accessory? This cozy wrap features a joyful plaid pattern the perfect thing to wear on a hayride, or to a football game in your team's colors. The pretty plaid is crocheted by using two colors of yarn held double, then alternating a single strand to make the color change. Worked flat, in the intarsia method, the pattern is a repetition of 9 sts and 7 rows, with yarn held double. MC is comprised of one strand of C1 and one strand of C2, while C1 holds two strands of C1 together and C2 holds two strands of C2 together. C1 should be the beginning and ending color of each row as this will create the solid color edging.
Sizes Included: 46" wide x 14" high, 50" wide x 14" high, 58" wide x 14" high, 62" wide x 14" high, 70" wide x 14" high

title: Anfora Blanketby Ilaria Caliri
description: Inspired by the modern and essential Scandinavian style, the Anfora blanket uses trapezoidal modules to achieve a geometric design. The easy stitch pattern gives a sturdy, cozy, and warm blanket. Anfora is an easy blanket that uses only slip stitch and single crochet stitches, perfect to practice and refine the working tension. It's formed using trapezoidal modules and half modules which are invisibly joined together at the end. The blanket edge is a narrow light stripe that looks like an I-cord.

title: Argyle Scarfby Lion Brand
description: Create a classic argyle scarf with a twist! This easy pattern is worked lengthwise in rows of single crochet worked in back loops only.

title: Art Deco Dressing Gownby Tiam Safari
description: Light and breezy, this Art Deco inspired dressing gown harks back to an era of glamour and is the perfect piece for getting ready for the big day or celebrating with the girls the night before! Drop shoulders and slightly oversized shaping give ease of movement, and an open front to makes sizing easy. The wavy lace body and ruffled hems make this wearable for a night out or a night in. The color used in the sample is no longer available. We have made substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder below.
Sizes Included: 40" finished chest measurement, 45" finished chest measurement, 50" finished chest measurement, 55" finished chest measurement, 60" finished chest measurement

title: Arwynn Blanketby Lion Brand
description: Watch tranquil colors fade into each other as you crochet the Arwynn Blanket. Get lost in the meditative stitches while you watch tv or listen to your favorite podcast. Blanket is made in one piece in rows of single crochet and using 2 colors of yarn. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Ashmont Aran Afghanby WeCrochet Design Team
description: Did you know you could use basic crochet stitches to mimic the look of a traditional Aran afghan? This design uses textured post stitches and popcorn stitches to create an heirloom to be passed from generation to generation. This afghan is made in one piece. A simple edging finishes the look, and tassels add a contemporary touch.

title: Aspen the Snowmanby Ashley Parker
description: This pattern was inspired by the snow people we built as children and the ones the next generation now make each winter. Aspen is an indoor snow person that will melt your heart and remind you of the playful memories of youth.

title: Aurora Wall Hangingby Leah Gordon
description: This wall hanging is inspired by shabby chic bohemian style. Pairing this style with a modern approach to filet crochet and textures creates a wonderfully airy and intentional décor item. Aurora Wall Hanging is worked flat from bottom up.

title: Aurora Wrapby Jessica Khochare
description: Inspired by the interconnected geometric pattern and texture that herringbone stitch offers, the Aurora Shawl gives a look of ethereal beauty. With intricate motifs made in overlay mosaic crochet technique and horizontal stripes of color play, this shawl could be a perfect handmade gift for your loved ones!
Needle / Hook Sizes: US E/6 (3.5 mm) and US D/3 (3mm): Crochet hook

title: Baby Animalsby Diana Moore
description: Baby Panda and Baby Bear were a special request from my daughter. Because they are only 1.5 inches tall (in sitting position), they fit perfectly in her dollhouse and she loves playing with them over and over and over. The pattern is a quick and easy one to make. I used Copper for Baby Bear and White and Black for Baby Panda, but Curio has so many beautiful colors that you can make a whole collection of colorful baby bears. If you sew the eyes with Curio Black thread instead of using plastic eyes, these bears made in all of Curio colors can be used to teach little ones colors and counting and sorting and make math more fun! To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Baby Bobble Jumperby Tiam Safari
description: Cute and covered in contrasting polka dot bobbles, this sweater is sure to pep up the wardrobe of any youngster! Worked in a super soft blend of superwash wool and acrylic, it's also easy to wash, wear after wear, no matter what is thrown at it! Worked flat in single crochet with contrasting bobbles, cuffs, and hems, this pattern is quick to master with an easy-to-memorize stitch pattern.
Sizes Included: 3 months - 18.5"  finished chest, 6 months - 19.5"  finished chest, 12 months - 20.5" finished chest, 18 months - 21.5"  finished chest, 24 months - 22.5" finished chest
Needle / Hook Sizes: US I/9 (5.5mm) Crochet Hook for body: US 7 (4.5mm) for ribbing

title: Baby Corgiby Lion Brand
description: The Baby Corgi Pattern is a crochet toy pattern made with super bulky weight yarn that has a skill level of easy. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Bambino Ripple Blanketby WeCrochet Design Team
description: Do you have a special baby in your life? This super-soft, super-simple blanket is the perfect gift! Made out of a machine-washable cotton blend, it’s as easy to care for as it is to stitch. This rectangular blanket is worked flat from the short end in an easily memorized two-row pattern stitch. The ripples are created by working balanced increases and decreases. The fabric pivots up over the aligned column of increases and points down over the aligned column of decreases.

title: Barefoot Yoga Bagby Dana Hogan
description: Functional meets fashionable in this adorable boho yoga mat bag! The lovely lace pattern gives it beauty while allowing the mat to have ample air to dry. The bag is worked in the round from the base up. Beading is optional, but if you choose to use beads, make sure the center holes are large enough to thread your yarn through.

title: Barva Blanketby Lisa Borum
description: Introducing the Barva Blanket! This blanket is a cozy, colorful creation with beautiful shades of colors. Each square is like a little flower, crocheted together to make a stunning blanket throw. Wrap yourself up in its softness and enjoy its vibrant charm all year long. It’s a handmade masterpiece that brings warmth and beauty to any room.

title: Beach Glass Throwby Lion Brand
description: Perfect for beginners, this throw is a beautiful addtion to any room in the house. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Beach Please Blanketby Lion Brand
description: The Beach Please Blanket is worked lengthwise back and forth in rows of half double crochet (hdc). To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Beginner Blanketby Heidi Wells
description: This simple blanket uses only the humble double crochet stitch along with bold, contrasting stripes of color to deliver big results. The combination of this yarn and stitch pattern creates a very stretchy fabric. The blanket will grow slightly larger in size with use over time but may be reblocked to the original size.

title: Belleville Sweaterby Natasha Robarge
description: Wishing for a light, soft, and dreamy project? Sophisticated comfort is at the core of this lovely garment, which showcases the delicate halo of lace-weight mohair combined elegantly with the subtle colors of hand-painted fingering weight wool. Sweater and swatch for this project are worked with the wool and mohair yarns held double and worked at the same time. Body is worked as one piece in turned rounds from hem to armholes. Sleeves are worked in turned rounds from cuff to armhole. Body and sleeves are joined for yoke, leaving a short span of fabric underarm for subsequent seaming. Yoke starts as a modified raglan and ends as a circular yoke with calculated decreases.
Sizes Included: 39" finished chest, 41" finished chest, 45" finished chest, 47" finished chest, 51" finished chest, 53" finished chest

title: Beloved Bobbles Hatby Crochet.com Design Team
description: These colorful bobbled hats are crocheted in self-striping sock yarn. Offered in two sizes, these cheerful earflap hats will chase away your winter doldrums. Hat begins from the top down, worked in the round with half double crochet stitches, with popcorn stitches made every other round. Once the body is complete, the earflaps are worked flat. Grab a bundle and save on the yarn!

title: Bermuda Toteby Two of Wands
description: Bold mitered squares get arranged in a magical way to form this rounded bottom tote perfect for a stroll through your favorite beach town. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Berry Jam Jar Dishclothby Sarah Nairalez
description: Add some flavor to your kitchen using Berry Stitch to create mini textured berries in this dishcloth pattern. The Berry Stitches stack neatly on top of each other for a classic look, and are great for scrubbing dishes.

title: Best Friend Scrunchies - Crochetby Katy Petersen
description: The Best Friend Scrunchie is the perfect last-minute crochet gift. It’s quick, stylish, and made with love. Made with Hawthorne yarn, it offers a soft, durable texture that ensures the recipient will enjoy it time and time again. This pattern is beginner friendly and works up extremely quickly. The scrunchie is worked in one piece in continuous rounds. One hank of Hawthorne will make at least 3 scrunchies, with leftovers.

title: Betulla Tunicby Ilaria Caliri
description: This pullover is inspired by the long and sturdy stem of birch trees Betulla in Italian. A warm and flattering garment on all body shapes with a high-low hemline, this pattern is easily adapted to be a shorter or longer tunic. The Betulla Tunic is a comfy high neck and sleeveless garment, worked flat from side to side for the front and back. Front and back are seamed along the sides and shoulders then armholes, ribbing, and neck are added working directly on the garment. Garment is meant to be worn with up to 6" of ease. Back is longer than the front.
Sizes Included: 37.25 " finished chest measurement, 41.25"  finished chest measurement, 43.25"  finished chest measurement, 45.25"  finished chest measurement, 49.5" finished chest measurement

title: Bewitched Bobble Blanketby Leah Gordon
description: This blanket was inspired by walks under the summer sun, getting cozy around a fire pit, and lounging outside. Eyecatching textures and filet effortlessly create striking shapes across the Bewitched Bobble Blanket. The Blanket pairs perfectly with the Fair Folk Pillow (pattern on pg. 158) to create a statement in any space.

title: Bias Granny Temperature Blanketby Toni Lipsey
description: Document your year in color when you make the Bias Granny Temperature Blanket. This temperature blanket chronicles the temperature for each day of the year using one of three carefully curated palettes in Swish DK yarn. Each granny square is joined as you go for a comfy, oversized throw blanket. Adjust the colors and temperature gauge to fit your local weather range. By New Year's Eve, your new favorite blanket will be complete, complete with 365 happy memories.

title: Blackberry Crumble Pulloverby Amanda Mannas
description: Outdoor adventures are best enjoyed with playful stripes and bold textures, whether it's a casual stroll, a trip to the park, or a walk in nature. The Blackberry Crumble Pullover is a seamed, drop-shoulder pullover worked from the bottom up. The sleeves and kangaroo pocket are worked in the wattle stitch. The sleeves and bottom hem are trimmed with ribbing and the neckline features a rolled collar. Garment is meant to be worn with 2.25 - 3.75" of positive ease for 6mo (12mo, 18mo, 2yr, 3yr, 4yr).
Sizes Included: 20.25"  finished chest circumference, 21.5" finished chest circumference, 22.75" finished chest circumference, 23.75"  finished chest circumference, 25" finished chest circumference, 26" finished chest circumference

title: Blissful Hair Towelby Emily Christine
description: The Blissful Hair Towel is a classic hair towel with a simple half-double crochet design that features a gorgeous front-post-back-post stitch along the base of the turban. These post stitches create a delightful texture twisting their way through the fabric when the towel is worn. This pattern is crocheted from the bottom up and decreased accordingly. Two individual panels are single crocheted together for a simple and easy to create construction.

title: Blizzard the Polar Bearby Kennedy Preston
description: This cuddly little polar bear cub brings all the warm and happy memories of winter to anyone who holds him! This pattern is worked in the round in separate pieces, stuffed, and stitched together to build the polar bear. The toy features a hat and scarf that can be customized using whatever winter colors you’d like!

title: Blossom Blouseby Dora Ohrenstein
description: The intricate lace featured in this design uses small shells that gradually build to larger shells, creating the look of a blossoming plant. The effect is echoed in the bell-shaped sleeve and flared hip. The blouse is worked in one piece from the top down with raglan increases in pattern. For the flared sleeve and hip, the basic pattern is enlarged by adding more chains.
Sizes Included: 33" finished chest measurement, 35.75" finished chest measurement, 41" finished chest measurement, 45" finished chest measurement

title: Boardwalk Hexie Blanketby Chrisandra Skipper
description: Inspired by the carnival boardwalks situated alongside the ocean, this modern throw is perfect for a new baby, a lapghan, or a home decor accent. Stitch up a statement with geometric hexagons and graphic stripes. The Boardwalk Hexie Blanket is a colorwork piece using simple stitches and the intarsia method. With intarsia, there is no carrying of colors; just drop your color and pick up the next one. It also features a hexagon pattern created with filet crochet.

title: Bobble Clutch Bagby Helen Anderson
description: This gorgeous versatile bag will add a touch of playful sophistication and glamour to any outfit. Bobble stitch is used to create the beautiful texture of this statement piece which could be worked up in minimal neutrals or bold and bright tones. This pattern is worked in the round. With a single crochet base and bobble stitch sides, the bag is made in one piece. Turning chains do not count as a stitch therefore, always work the first stitch of each round into the same stitch as the turning chain. Turn work at the end of each round from Rnd 10 onwards.

title: Bobble Diamonds Throwby Sara Dudek
description: This small throw uses texture and geometric shapes to create playful patterning. Practice your bobble stitches while learning to read a crochet chart. You'll find both skills to be easier than you expect. The geometric patterning for this throw is created by combining half double crochet stitches with bobble stitches. Read the chart to find out where to place the bobbles to create intricate patterning. You'll love working this throw with this soft and cozy yarn!

title: Bobble Soap Sackby WeCrochet Design Team
description: Designed to support the mission of nonprofit organization S.A.C.K. (Supporting A Community with Kindness). This organization's vision is to inspire donations of bar soap to local food pantries, homeless shelters, social service agencies, and veterans clinics. By crocheting a soap sack and pairing it with a sealed bar of soap, you can give essential toiletries and a lovingly handmade item to those who need them. Find out more at soapsacks.org. This pattern is fun to crochet, and results in a soap sack with a scrubby side, thanks to the bobble stitches on the front. The bobbles provide a focal point, and a catalyst for creativity as you mix and match yarns to create unique soap sacks. You'll want to make these for gifts as well as donations to deserving organizations. The soap sack is crocheted as a large rectangle and then folded and seamed using a sl st. A long chain creates a drawstring that is threaded after assembly.

title: Bobby Granny Square Blanketby Lion Brand
description: The Bobby Granny Square Blanket is a crochet blanket pattern made with medium weight yarn that has an easy level of difficulty. 1 Granny Square = about 6" square. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Bold and Bright Scarfby 10 Hours or Less
description: Fight the cold in color with a chunky, chill–chasing crocheted scarf! Worked with just one color per row, the simple striped pattern consists entirely of slip stitches and half double crochet. Best of all? It’s an easy–to–memorize 2–row repeat. Scarf is worked vertically in rows in one piece from long edge to long edge. Each stripe begins and ends with a long length of yarn subsequently incorporated into the fringe. This eliminates the need to weave in ends. Scarf is reversible, displaying a different striping effect on each side.
Sizes Included: 8.5” wide × 83.5” long, not including fringe - Bright, 8.5” wide × 83.5” long, not including fringe - Neutral

title: Bonny Mittsby Brenda K.B. Anderson
description: You can practically smell the stacks of old books and leather armchairs that populate the library in your mind as you wear these classic tweed fingerless mitts. This project is incredibly easy and suitable for advanced beginners as well as more seasoned crocheters looking for a fun and quick project. These mitts are worked sideways, in turned rows, and slip stitched together to form a tube.
Sizes Included: 5.5" hand circumference, 6" hand circumference, 6.5" hand circumference, 7.5" hand circumference

title: Boom Box Belt Bag & Mix Tape Walletby Heather Mann
description: Turn up the volume in retro style with this mashup of iconic 80s style and technology. Feed your favorite belt through the loops on the back of the Boom Box Belt Bag to turn it into a hands-free purse, reminiscent of a fanny pack. Keep your credit cards and change managed in the Mix Tape Wallet, which fits neatly inside the Boom Box. Both of these are simple zipper pouches worked in the round from the base up. Tapestry crochet is used to create the designs, carrying up to three yarns inside the piece as you work.

title: Bop Shop Earringsby Ashley Zhong
description: Jukebox pop and record shop bops are the inspiration for these irresistible earrings. Make yourself a pair and dream back to the days of vinyl, flares, and roller skates. Bop Shop Earrings are simple circles of Double Crochet worked in the round and finished with jewelry supplies you can find at any craft store.

title: Botanica Throwby Kalurah Hudson
description: The Botanica Throw draws inspiration from delicate vintage doilies from days gone by. This piece works beautifully as a cozy throw or a charming area rug. The throw is embellished with tassels at each of the four corners. Pattern comes with two detailed charts and written instructions. Super Bulky yarn is held double for the entire throw.
Needle / Hook Sizes: US Q/17 (15.75mm) and US P/16 (11.5mm) crochet hook,

title: Botanist Basketby Lion Brand
description: The Botanist Basket is a crochet basket pattern made with super bulky weight yarn that has an easy level of difficulty. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: approx. 6" tall x 25" at the widest point

title: Brava Beanieby Sara Dudek
description: The Brava Beanie is the ultimate crochet hat pattern! Written for six sizes, this is the ideal hat to make for charity projects, or as gifts. It's simple and quick-to-make, giving you the freedom to dress it up however you like. The Brava Beanie is made from the top down in single crochet. Simple increases at the crown alter the sizing. Once you master this simple pattern, add stripes, tapestry patterns, spike stitches and more. With the many colors available in Brava Worsted, you'll be able to make this hat uniquely your own.
Sizes Included: Preemie - 12" circ. x 5"long  , Baby - 14"circ.  x 5.5" long , Toddler - 16" circ. x 6.5" long , Child - 18"circ.  x 7.5" long , Adult Small - 20"circ.  x 8" long  , Adult Large 22" circ. x 8" long

title: Bridesmaid Shawlby Michele DuNaier
description: This delicate, lacy shawl can be made in a variety of sizes and colors. From extra-small through extra-large, the sizes provided can fit a very young flower girl through larger members of the bridal party. With over 150 colors to choose from, Palette yarn is guaranteed to have a shade to coordinate with your chosen wedding colors. The Bridesmaid Shawl is worked top down from the back of the neck, with increasing done at the sides and the center spine. A simple 6-row repeat can be done a variable number of times to create different sizes. The net and picot-scalloped lower edging set off the lacework making this an elegant, heirloom shawl to treasure.
Sizes Included: XS - 30" wide x 14" at deepest point, S - 40" wide x 18" at deepest point, M - 51" wide x 22" at deepest point, L - 61" wide x 26" at deepest point, XL - 72" wide x 30" at deepest point
Needle / Hook Sizes: Sizes G/6 (4.00mm), 7 (4.50mm), and  F/5 (3.75mm) Crochet hooks

title: Bright Gifts Wrapby Helen Anderson
description: Brighten up any gray winter day with this vibrant Bright Gifts Wrap. The beautiful elongated triangular shape makes it easy to wear and wonderfully snug. The Bright Gifts Wrap is worked flat, from the long side of the wrap across, and decreased along one edge. The wrap is crocheted in Half Double Crochet.

title: Buffalo Check Pom-Pom Hatby Ashley Gibbons
description: Inspired by a Canadian favorite, Buffalo Plaid, this is a classic yet fashionable hat to be enjoyed by everybody for years to come! Its use of crocheted texture and post stitches creates a cozy, squishiness that provides warmth and comfort. The Buffalo Check Pom Pom Hat is worked from the top down. Options are given to give you two different looks - a full hat option to add a pom pom or a messy bun hat option!
Sizes Included: Messy bun hat: 9" x 7.5" (fits adults 21-23"), Full hat: 9" x 8.25" (fits adults 21-23")

title: Buffalo Check Pom-Pom Scarfby Ashley Gibbons
description: Inspired by a Canadian favorite, Buffalo Plaid, this is a classic yet fashionable scarf to be enjoyed by everybody for years to come! Its use of crocheted texture and post stitches creates a cozy, squishiness that provides warmth and comfort. The Buffalo Check Pom-Pom Scarf pattern is worked in one rectangular piece, with some post work, with the option of finishing the scarf as an infinity scarf or styling it up with two pom-poms for a fashionable double pom scarf!

title: Bun Bun Bunnyby Ilaria Caliri
description: Bun-Bun Bunny is the perfect childhood companion. A soft and furry plush who is entirely made in crochet, hidden underneath the fur. Add a jacket to enhance the handmade toy feel. This project uses the “amigurumi technique” of holding together a plain and a fur yarn. It only uses single crochet stitches worked in rounds. The head and body are worked in one piece starting at the top of the head. Then ears, arms, legs, and tail are sewn to the body. A portion of the ears and the muzzle fur is shortened using sharp scissors.

title: C2C Color Fade Dishclothby Sarah Nairalez
description: This dishcloth is simple and a great first Corner to Corner (C2C) project. With basic color changes, this dishcloth will add a pop of color to your kitchen. There's a practical loop on one corner, making it easy to hang. In the Corner to Corner (C2C) technique, each block is made of a 3 chains and 3 double crochet and the project is worked from one corner to the other.

title: Cabled Spa Clothby Beth Major
description: Learn the basics of crochet cabling with this wonderfully textured spa cloth.

title: Calathea Cardiganby Natasha Robarge
description: New leaves are one of the most promising and inspiring symbols of spring. Calathea Cardigan highlights a beautiful combination of stitches which create a wide, solid-leaf border and a large, lace-leaf body. The leaves are formed by special composite stitches (groups of stitches linked together mid-way) which suspend the leaves in a circular web of chain spaces. The stitch guide provides explanation for the composite stitches used in the pattern and a chart helps to visualize them. The duster also showcases a striking effect of thread crochet lace in a comfortable weight. Open front and high slits at the sides of the duster create a flowing silhouette accommodating for many body types.
Sizes Included: 41" finished chest, 45" finished chest, 49" finished chest, 54" finished chest, 57" finished chest, 61" finished chest

title: Campus Cable Scarfby Quayln Stark
description: Colorwork cables softly twist over one another on this elegant and sophisticated scarf. Campus Cable is a long scarf worked flat using both crochet cable and colorwork techniques. Six cables intersect, with the leftmost three always tucking under the others, giving an additional appearance of a large single twisting cable.

title: Canada Pillowby Lion Brand
description: The Canada Pillow is a crochet pattern made with medium-weight yarn that has a skill level of easy. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Candy Cane Pillowby Iassia Kryvonos
description: Candy Cane swirl framed into a granny square looks so fun and festive. Worked in the contrasting spirals of traditional holiday colors, or timeless neutrals, and decorated with long tassels on the corners, this chunky pillow is fast to make and oh-so-good for snuggling up near the fireplace all winter long. Will it be a last-minute Christmas gift for someone you love, or an impressive accent for your exclusive home decor? It’s up to you.
Needle / Hook Sizes: US M/13 (9mm) and US L/11 (8mm) Crochet hook

title: Candy Stripes Scarfby Mary Dickerson
description: This sweet infinity scarf is worked in double crochet, making an easy and quick project. It features a main color running through the entire project, with stripes of color changes in between. Worked in the round as a double layer creates a warm and cozy piece you'll never want to take off. All the yarn ends remain inside the scarf, so you won't have to weave in all those ends created by the color changes. The Candy Stripe Scarf is very versatile, as you can wear it as an infinity scarf or double it up around your neck to wear it as a cowl.

title: Cannon Mountain Cardiganby Anastasia Popova
description: Ready to wrap up in style? This cardigan is a versatile choice. Pull it in at the waist with its coordinating optional sash for a snug fit, and use its hood for extra warmth. Length finishes at low thigh. And of course, everything is better with pockets! The body is worked in one piece from the bottom up to the underarm. The sleeves are worked from the cuff up with a diamond cable and bobbles. Then the sleeves and body are joined and the yoke is worked with raglan shaping. The main stitch of the cardigan is linked double crochet which creates beautiful texture with a nice drape. The color used in the sample is no longer available. We have made substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder below.
Sizes Included: 38" finished chest, 42" finished chest, 46" finished chest, 50" finished chest, 54" finished chest

title: Canopy Shawlby Rebecca Velasquez
description: This shawl is inspired by the ever-reaching forest canopy: a repeating zigzag pattern grows progressively longer, ending in a row of outstretched picots, reminiscent of the leaves on treetops. The shawl is worked flat from the center out, growing in depth and width with every row. Refer to the image on page 4 for guidance.

title: Carnaby Striped Dressby Lion Brand
description: Playful stripes make the Carnaby Striped Dress ideal for layering over shirts or leggings, adding both style and comfort to any outfit. Crafted with ease in mind, this dress is a delightful addition to your child’s wardrobe and a satisfying project for any crochet enthusiast. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: Sm - 28" finished chest, Md - 30" finished chest, Lg - 33" finished chest

title: Carsyn Cardiganby Lion Brand
description: Colorful & stylish, this beginner level cardigan is perfect for throwing on for a night on the town. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: 46" finished chest , 52" finished chest , 58" finished chest , 64" finished chest

title: Cascina Cabled Headbandby Quayln Stark
description: The twisting and braiding of cables in tandem with pops of bobbles conjure a picture of crawling ivy and climbing roses on this contemporary yet classic headband. The Cascina Cabled Headband is an oval-shaped ear warmer, worked flat from point to point, then seamed together at the end with an elastic hair tie. Unique wedge cable shaping grows from one cable to six at the start and shrinks from six cables down to one at the end.

title: Cassette Afghanby Lee Sartori
description: Make the ultimate homage to the music of the 80s with this pop-color Cassette Afghan. Have fun choosing colors to create the perfect mix of shades for this fun and funky throwback. Pattern is written in 3 parts. Cassette Wheels are worked separately, then joined together in rounds to create body of the Cassette. Cassette Reel is worked as an applique.

title: Casual Carry All Bagby 10 Hours or Less
description: Turn a flat piece of fabric into a smart and stylish crocheted bag! Ideally suited for heavy worsted or light bulky weight yarn, this crossbody carryall features a ridged front flap and a basic single crochet body. Neatly fastened with a sew–on snap, the simple construction makes it a suitable choice for beginners. Bag is worked back–and–forth in rows in one continuous piece from front flap to strap. Once the stitching is complete, the sides and strap are sewn together to join.
Sizes Included: 12” width × 11” length × 2” depth, not including strap - Bright, 12” width × 11” length × 2” depth, not including strap - Neutral

title: Catfish Purr-Maidby Brenda K.B. Anderson
description: The fun fish-scale textured tail is worked back and forth in rows for cleaner results. The Tail Fin is worked back and forth in vertical rows through the back lps to give it a ribbed appearance. Features are crocheted with embroidery floss and then stitched to head, making it easier to get the expression you want. The rest of this Catfish Purr-maid's pieces are worked in the round in typical amigurumi style.

title: Cathedral Cable Mittensby Brenda K.B. Anderson
description: Inspired by gothic cathedral windows, these pretty mittens feature elegant cables that climb upward to meet at the fingertip under an archway of post stitches. Mittens are worked bottom up, in the round without joins. When working from the cable chart, pay close attention to where to begin as this is different for each size. The Round number of mitten directions does not correspond to the round number of cable chart. Color used in the sample is no longer available. We have made some substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder below.

title: CeCe Bagby Alyssa George
description: Inspired by coastal vibes and warm summer breezes, this bag is your perfect companion for exploring new places, finding old treasures, and soaking up all that summer has to offer.

title: Celtic Afghanby Lion Brand
description: The Celtic Afghan - Version 1 is a crochet afghan pattern made with medium weight yarn that has a skill level of advanced. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Celtic Weave Dishclothby Tian Connaughton
description: Brighten the winter months with this cheerful project! This dishcloth features a textured woven inspired stitch, using both the front post treble stitch and the back post treble stitch. The end result is a beautiful dishcloth that will last through wash after wash.

title: Checkmate Vestby Lion Brand
description: Create a vibrant and cozy child's vest with the Checkmate Vest crochet pattern, featuring a striking checkerboard design. Crafted using Color Theory yarn, this project is both easy to make and care for, perfect for adding a playful touch to your little one’s wardrobe. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: Sm - 28" finished chest, Med - 30" finished chest, Lg - 33" finished chest

title: Chevron Dishclothby Tian Connaughton
description: This dishcloth is created using chunky chevrons with a simple single crochet edge and loop for hanging. Works great in both multi and solid yarns!

title: Chevron Loopy Cushionby Tiam Safari
description: Add another layer of softness to your d é cor with this loopy cushion. Alternating chevron stripes of single crochet with loops creates a beautiful texture. The cushion is worked flat, with a plain back and an easy-to-remember chevron pattern on the front panel, and an overlapped back panel to make removing the insert and washing your cover a breeze!
Sizes Included: 15.75" square, to fit 17.75" square cushion insert

title: Chromatic Granny Stripe Cowlby Hannah Maier
description: Granny stripe enthusiasts, rejoice! This super simple stitch shows off the subtly shifting hues of two Chroma Twist colorways as you crochet your way around this oh-so-wearable cowl. Every cluster of double crochets is unique as the Chroma plies change across each hank, for a truly mesmerizing project. Yarn used in the sample is no longer available; we have made a similar color suggestion in the yarn calculator below.

title: Chrysalis Cardigan Setby Dawn Curran
description: Inspired by the life cycle of a butterfly, these big and small cardigans feature a caterpillar motif on the child's cardigan and a butterfly motif on the adult cardigan. The main body of the sweater is made in an easy stitch pattern with a rib edging worked all around. The caterpillar and butterfly motifs on the pockets are made using intarsia crochet which are then sewn onto the cardigan fronts. While the adult cardigan is designed to be worn open, the child's cardigan is designed with button fastening for practicality.

title: Chunky Rib Tunisian Hat and Cowlby WeCrochet Design Team
description: Designed for both beginners and for anyone in search of last-minute gifts, this hat and cowl set is the perfect choice for wintry days. The chunky texture looks equally great worked in either ombre or solid color yarn.
Sizes Included: Hat 19.25" circumference and Cowl 12" tall - Greens, Hat 19.25" circumference and Cowl 12" tall - Blues
Needle / Hook Sizes: Hat: US H/8 (5.0mm) Tunisian hook; Cowl: US K/10.5 (6.5mm) Tunisian hook

title: Circle Cushion (Crochet)by Lion Brand
description: The Circle Cushion is a crochet pattern made with jumbo weight yarn that has a skill level of easy. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Circle Of Flowers Afghanby Lion Brand
description: The Circle Of Flowers Afghan is a crochet throw pattern made with medium weight yarn that has a skill level of intermediate. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Clara Dressby Alla Koval
description: Enjoy springtime sweetness year-round with this intriguing lace crochet dress. It looks intricate but is actually easy to make! This dress is worked in turned rounds. The skirt is worked first, from the top down, with layers increasing to hem by adding additional shells. Make skirt in any length by repeating the last layer. Bodice is worked after the skirt, from the waist up to armholes.

title: Clean Sweep Rugby Katy Petersen
description: Sweep away the gray and pop some color with the Clean Sweep Rug. Brava Mini Packs make choosing colors a no-brainer, or use up small amounts of leftover yarn for a truly unique project that will make your home happy. The Clean Sweep Rug can be made as a circle or rectangle. The circle rug is worked in turned rounds to the desired diameter. The rectangle rug is worked flat, changing color every row and leaving the ends to make the fringe. For both shapes, change color every round/row alternating between MC and colors from the mini pack chosen at random.
Sizes Included: Small Circle, Large Circle, Small Rectangle, Large Rectangle

title: Clematis Headbandby Kate Alinari
description: Crocheting gifts should be fun and joyful, so plan in advance and choose cute and easy-to-make projects. This headband is quick to make if you have some experience with crochet cables. If not, it's a good opportunity to try out a new skill with a small project. This cable headband is crocheted flat, in rows, using single crochet and front post stitches to make cables. Only one seam is needed to form a ring. An elastic band is added at the back for a secure fit.

title: Cloud Nine Hair Towelby Smitha Crasta
description: Bath leisure is something we all love. A cute and pretty hair towel, instead of a boring every day one, just adds enough oomph to an otherwise regular spa at home. Designed in CotLin, this towel is efficient in absorbing dampness and is soft on hair. A quick Tunisian hair towel with colorful bobbles worked into the Tunisian knit stitches. The towel is worked in two panels which are seamed at the top. It can be customized to any hair length.
Sizes Included: Small: 11" wide, 15" long, Medium: 11" wide, 25" long, Large: 11" wide (at widest point), 28" long
Needle / Hook Sizes: E/4 (3.5mm) crochet hook & L/11 (8.0mm) Tunisian hook

title: Color Block Cushionby Helen Anderson
description: This fresh, modern color block project can be created with bold contrasting color sections or subtle shade changes. Its versatility and playfulness make it a welcome addition to any sofa. The Color Block Cushion is crocheted in one piece from the bottom up. Worked flat, it is then folded and seamed along the side seams with a 4" overlap creating an envelope style opening at the back.

title: Color Me Perfect Wrapby Lisa Borum
description: The Color Me Perfect Wrap is a vibrant, lightweight accessory featuring linen stitch for a soft, woven texture. Alternating eight bold colors, it creates a striking yet wearable piece that adds flair to any outfit. Bursts of color and calming rhythm come together in the Color Me Perfect Wrap, inspired by the beauty of individuality and joyful self-expression. Like brushstrokes on a canvas, each shade adds depth, warmth, and personality to this eye-catching accessory meant to brighten any day. The wrap is worked flat using linen stitch, a beginner-friendly technique that creates a beautifully textured, woven-like fabric. Featuring eight alternating colors, it includes simple color changes, clean edges, and a rhythmic stitch pattern that makes it both meditative to crochet and visually striking when worn.

title: Color Me Quick Vestby 10 Hours or Less
description: Basic stitches in super bulky combine to create a fast and fun crocheted vest! The simple straight–edged silhouette doesn’t require increasing or decreasing. That means fuss-free stitching for both new and experienced crocheters. Vest is worked back–and–forth in rows in one piece from bottom to armholes. Then the piece is divided and the fronts worked separately from the back. After stitching is complete, the shoulders are sewn together to join. Sizes included: 27.75 (30.5, 33.75, 39, 42.5)(45, 50.25, 53.5, 57)” finished chest; meant to fit 28–30 (32–34, 36–38, 40–42, 44–46)(48–50, 52–54, 56–58, 60–62)” chest circumference. Shown in size 33.75."
Sizes Included: 27.75 -30.5" finished chest - Bright, 33.75 -57" finished chest - Bright, 27.75 -30.5" finished chest - Neutral, 33.75 -57" finished chest - Neutral

title: Color Pop Super Scarfby Two of Wands
description: Conquer the chilliest of temps and bundle up with this bold super scarf, or simply drape it over the shoulders as an extra layer. Easy, quick, and repetitive granny clusters become addicting in this design as you watch the colors pop with each contrasting row.

title: Coloratura Lace Topby Rachel Beth
description: The Coloratura Lace Top features a delicate shell stitch in a range of colors that is set against a solid accent color. This top makes a sophisticated addition to your summer wardrobe. The top is worked from the bottom up, initially in the round and then in rows for the front and back of the chest, which are identical rectangles. Finally, the front and back are joined at each shoulder, creating a boat neck. The top features a four-row lace repeat alternating with two rows of solid double crochet. The pattern uses one main color and several different accent colors. Use a different accent color for each repeat of Rounds 3-6 in the main body and Rows 1-4 (or Rows 7, 2-4) of the front and back panels. Use the same color sequence for the front and back panels. Some colors used in the sample are no longer available. We have made substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder.
Sizes Included: 32" finished chest measurement, 35" finished chest measurement, 37.75" finished chest measurement, 40.75" finished chest measurement, 43.75" finished chest measurement, 46.5" finished chest measurement, 49.5" finished chest measurement, 52.25" finished chest measurement, 55.25" finished chest measurement, 58.25" finished chest measurement, 61" finished chest measurement, 64"  finished chest measurement

title: Colorwork Yoke Sweaterby Amy Gunderson
description: Modern, graphic colorwork covers the circular yoke of this pullover. A herringbone post stitch pattern placed on lower body and sleeves echoes the lines of the yoke. Challenge yourself to learn new techniques like stranded crochet and post stitches in this winter wardrobe staple. This sweater is worked seamlessly from the top down. Yoke increases are worked directly into the fair isle patterning. Garment is meant to be worn with 2-6" of ease.
Sizes Included: 34"  finished chest measurement, 39.5" finished chest measurement, 45.25" finished chest measurement, 50.75" finished chest measurement, 56.5" finished chest measurement, 62" finished chest measurement

title: Columbia River Cabled Hatby Alla Koval
description: Named after the great Pacific Northwest river, the Columbia River Cable Hat is crocheted in a striking combination of popcorn stitches and post stitches that create a stunning allover pattern reminiscent of the swirls and eddies of a river. The Columbia River Cabled Hat is worked from brim to crown in joined rounds. The band is worked after hat is complete. The first Back Post Double Crochet of each round is worked around the first BPDC and beg ch-2 together. Some colors used in the sample are no longer available; we have made similar color suggestions in the kit builder.

title: Comfort Crochet Pet Blanketby Stacey Winklepleck
description: Animals need their comfort, too! This sweet Snuggle blanket is designed to make dogs and cats stay in shelters a bit calmer. A simple basketweave pattern and soft acrylic yarn create a blanket that can be washed again and again.
Needle / Hook Sizes: US 15/N (9mm) crochet hook  or size to obtain gauge

title: Confused Textures Dishclothby Jennifer Pionk
description: If you live for texture, this dishcloth won't disappoint! It looks great in variegated and solids. For a little more punch, add a couple stripes in a contrasting color.

title: Conifer Scarfby Elena and Kamila
description: With just a two-row repeat the Conifer Scarf will be your go-to for gift giving this season. Worked with a row of cluster stitches and a row of single crochet, this is an ideal beginner crochet pattern while also perfect when you have a need for a quick crochet project. Slip into the meditative practice of crochet as this scarf flows off your hook, one stitch at a time. Wool of the Andes™ (bulky, 100% Peruvian Highland Wool; 137yds/100g): MC Lumberjack 28216; 3 hanks C1 Gosling 28214; 2 hanks C2 Masala 28217; 2 hanks

title: Cookies & Cream Dishclothby Heidi Wells
description: Much like the experience of eating a cookie, this dishcloth pattern is sweet, easy and addicting. Simple rows of half double crochet in alternating colors are worked up in a jiffy, leaving you plenty of time to finish that cookie snack.

title: Corner to Corner Afghanby Sara Dudek
description: Create a classic corner to corner (C2C) afghan inspired by modern quilts. Make this lovely blanket in your favorite colors to complement any space in your home. Learn the corner to corner technique with this afghan pattern. In making this project, you'll learn C2C increasing, decreasing, how to read a chart, and changing colors. After this project, you'll be ready to tackle any C2C pattern!

title: Cozy Cabin Throw Blanketby Jessica Herr
description: Designed to add warmth and style to any space, this cozy throw blanket combines simple stitches with luxurious yarn, resulting in a blanket that’s as enjoyable to make as it is to use. The Cozy Cabin Throw Blanket pattern uses two yarn colors to make a fun and simple striped design. The piece is worked in turned rows and utilizes the crumpled griddle stitch. On each corner of the blanket, there is a colorful and cute pompom to add a bit of flair to this otherwise simple and elegant design.

title: Cozy Infinity Scarfby Miroslava Mihalkova
description: reshly fallen snow on fields with gentle peaks and troughs intimately contouring the landscape inspired this textured infinity scarf. The scarf is the perfect accessory to wrap yourself in when refreshing your soul and mind in the nature sanctuary during winter months. The scarf is worked flat along the long edge. It begins with a row of foundation Single Crochet and ends with a row of Single Crochet. The six-row repeat of Single Crochet and 3 rows of Half Double Crochet is worked for the width of the scarf.

title: Creamsicle Dishclothby Sarah Nairalez
description: Textured stitches are a favorite for dishcloths. Using a Puff Stitch in a checkerboard configuration not only looks visually pleasing but also adds extra texture to your dishcloth.

title: Crescendo Filet Wrapby Adinda Hening
description: Looking for a summer accessory that is light and airy? This wrap can be your go-to. It is also easy to make as you only need to chain and double crochet. The wrap is worked flat from the center out. After one side is worked, new yarn is joined to the foundation chain to work the other side.

title: Cropped Square Topby Lion Brand
description: This cute & fashionable top is perfect for your next spring outing! The Cropped Square Top is a crochet top pattern made with medium weight yarn that has a skill level of intermediate. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: 36" finished chest, 40" finished chest, 44" finished chest, 48" finished chest, 51" finished chest, 55" finished chest

title: Crossings Earwarmer, Cowl, and Mittsby Ruth Nguyen
description: A contemporary snowflake motif is used in a variety of ways across this sporty, stylish set of earwarmer, cowl, and mitts. The sport-weight colorwork is worked using tapestry crochet and sewn to the cozy faux-fur lining. Buttons fasten the earwarmer snugly around the head. Quick to whip up, this cozy accessory set will become your neck, hands, and ears’ favorite thing this winter, whether you’re hitting a ski slope or out for some holiday shopping!

title: Crumpet Shawlby Lisa Gentry
description: The Crumpet Shawl is worked with beginner friendly double crochet stitches, forming intricate shells, graceful v-stitches, and delicate picots. What makes this crochet shawl truly special is its versatility as a gift. Whether you’re celebrating a cherished friendship, or simply showing someone you care, this shawl is a heartfelt expression for all occasions. The Crumpet crochet shawl will warm not only the body but also the heart of the recipient. CotLin™ (DK, 70% Tanguis Cotton, 30% Linen; 123yds/50g): Chicory 27758; 8 skeins

title: Cumberland Tankby Two of Wands
description: Designed for summer boat trips and picnics in the park, the Cumberland Tank is a shell style sleeveless top with a slightly relaxed fit. This striped fabric evokes a classic feel that will carry through years to come. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.
Sizes Included: 35" finished chest, 39" finished chest, 43" finished chest, 47" finished chest, 51" finished chest, 55" finished chest, 59" finished chest, 63" finished chest

title: Custard Pie Dishclothby Heidi Wells
description: This easy shell stitch center creates a delectable, textured effect, snugly framed by a chunky single crochet border.

title: Daisy Mandala Beanieby Alla Koval
description: Inspired by the cheerful daisy, this delicate beanie adds a floral touch to any ensemble. Crocheted in rounds, this piece offers a comfy fit while gently taming your tresses. Get playful with vibrant hues and use multiple yarn colors, or add a pop of style by crocheting a contrasting color border.

title: Dancing Shells Dishclothby Kim Cameron
description: The shell stitch is a popular crochet stitch, but this dishcloth is taking it a step further. The dancing raised shells gives an interesting texture to look at and works double duty when washing your dishes!

title: Dandelion Crop Cardiby Brenda K.B. Anderson
description: This cropped cardigan is just the thing to throw on over a sundress in transitional weather or the air-conditioned office. Dandelion chains and leaves encircle the yoke as the body gives way to a flattering deep ribbed band below the bust. The Dandelion Cardi is a steeked colorwork yoke sweater, worked in the round from the top down. Short Rows are used just below the colorwork section to raise the back neck of the sweater. Ribbing is created in turned rows and joined as you go to the hem, armholes, and neckline. Ribbed button bands are crocheted separately and stitched to fronts after steek is cut.
Sizes Included: 32.5" finished chest measurement, 35.75" finished chest measurement, 38.75" finished chest measurement, 41" finished chest measurement, 44.25" finished chest measurement, 47.25" finished chest measurement, 50" finished chest measurement, 53" finished chest measurement, 55.25" finished chest measurement

title: Dara Knot Blanketby Kristen Clay
description: A cozy basketweave - the perfect rustic texture for Brava Tweed - frames the simple center of this delightfully modern blanket to wrap you or your loved ones in the heartwarming joy of handmade. The wide basketweave border is created with crossed front and back post treble crochet stitches and is worked as you go. The pattern is written for four sizes so you can choose the one right for you.
Sizes Included: 28" wide x 28" long , 28" wide x 35" long , 41" wide x 49" long , 50" wide x 66" long

title: Darcy Tote Bagby Joyce Geisler
description: This is a great bag to hold all the essentials for a walk around town, the beach or the local craft and antiques market. The Darcy Tote bag is a quick and easy pattern to make. It is worked in two identical panels that are then joined on three sides by single crochet. The top edge is worked in Reverse Single Crochet for added detail, and the fringe at the bottom is a simple slip stitch into a chain. A little tassel on the zipper pull makes it easy to open and close. An easy fabric lining is added with a zipper at the top, and the lining is sewn to the crochet bag. Snap on a purchased strap and it is ready to go!

title: Dazzler the Unicorn Headbandby Brenda K.B. Anderson
description: Who doesn't want to be a unicorn? This playful headband fits children as well as adults because why should the kids shouldn't have all the fun. Great for birthday celebrations, dance parties, or any day when you need a little extra magic. The way this horn spirals as it grows from your hands feels just like magic. The spiraling happens as a result of a few increases right next to a few decreases. Be careful not to miss the first half of the first decrease, since it does get a little crowded with all those increase stitches next to it. A crocheted circle gets folded in half around a half-circle of plastic canvas and is stitched around the center of a plastic headband to create the base. This allows more room to attach the horn and flowers and helps keep the headband upright.
Sizes Included: Headband cover sized to fit 1" wide headband

title: Dearly Beloved Shawlby Michele DuNaier
description: A lovely confection of shells, fans, loops, and lace, the Dearly Beloved Shawl was designed for a special day! With a delicate curved shape and a picot edging, and made from yarn as soft as a cloud, this shawl will become a cherished heirloom. The shawl begins at the back of the neck with a dense shell Section. The rows widen with increasing at the row ends and at the center. The fabric gently transitions into openwork sections then ends with a lower edging picot row.
Sizes Included: 66" along top edge x 24" down center

title: Desert Hills Throwby Chrisandra Skipper
description: Imagine cozying up on a cool morning, holding a cup of coffee, with the sun beaming down. This blanket is a perfect fit for those cool mornings on the back deck or evenings by the lake. The Dayscape Blanket features simple color work and filet crochet. The color work is done using bobbins to allow for seamless transitions on the front and back. The sky pops with the filet style crochet for added texture and interest.

title: Design Your Own Sea Creatureby Jennifer Olivarez
description: Humans have explored only 5% of the ocean floor. The rest of this underwater realm remains uncharted. Ponder the mysteries that lurk in the deepest parts of our oceans while designing your own yet-to-be-discovered sea creature. Start with the body, which is crocheted from the top down, using chain spaces to create openings for the mouth and tail. From there a unique sea creature is sure to emerge as you decide which body parts to add. Choose from among the tails, fins, spikes, spots, tentacles, lures, and whisker-like feelers to complete your creature.
Sizes Included: Short-tail creature: 7" long, 5.5" tall, 3" wide, Long-tail creature: 12.5" long, 5.5" tall, 3" wide

title: Dewdrop Back Scrubberby Ashley Gibbons
description: They say there's nothing like a good morning shower to get your day started on the right foot. One can only imagine what a shower with a great back scrub could do for your mind and body. Ensure you have a great shower (and day) with this Dewdrop Scrubber with its invigorating texture. The Bobble Back Scrubber is worked in a single piece using the bobble stitch in an arrow pattern to create a deep cleaning texture.
Sizes Included: Child Size: 6.5" wide x 20.5" long, Adult Size: 6.5" wide x 28" long, without handles

title: Diamond Bucket Bagby Chrisandra Skipper
description: Toss everything you need for the big day into this chic little bag, then continue to use it for your honeymoon and beyond. A geometric pattern gives this romantic backpack a modern edge. This is a bucket-style bag with a cinched top. It is worked in the round and features horizontal bobble stitches and tapestry colorwork that gives it great dimension. The double layer bottom gives it extra integrity to carry all the things you need

title: Diamond Shine Scarfby Kristen Clay
description: Squares become diamonds! Three favorite colors combine to make an unusual but quick-to-stitch scarf - gift it or pair it with cool weather outfits. Simple 3-color granny squares are joined tip to tip to create a fun twist on a basic motif, an easy tote-along project. Lace V-shaped inserts fill in the sides and create a side edging at the same time. Tassels are optional.

title: Dot to Dot Lapghanby Two of Wands
description: This geometric crochet lapghancan serve as a small blanket for the couch or the car, and it can also function as a decorative rug. High contrast streams of bobbles accent a simple base of double crochet to bring a modern aesthetic to this easy project.

title: Dragonfly Delight Dishclothby Jennifer Pionk
description: A simple stitch pattern worked in the round to create a dragonfly motif. Add a simple edging in a contrasting color for a finishing touch.

title: Duo Granny Bandanaby Two of Wands
description: This trendy spring accessory works overtime as a kerchief that works for the head or the neck. Worked up in classic granny squares, it will give a pop of color to any outfit. Work up several with the same colors in different orders for you and all your pals.

title: Dusk Camisoleby Jane Howorth
description: Inspired by the beauty of an English country garden at dusk, the Trefoil stitch used in this camisole resembles leaves entwined around a trellis background. This camisole will add a touch of lace to your favorite summer outfits. The camisole is worked in one piece from hem to upper edge. The straps and edgings are worked directly onto the garment without the need for seaming. Edgings and buttonholes should be worked carefully to achieve a neat finish. Use a smaller hook than that specified if required. Take care to choose buttons that fit the buttonholes well.
Sizes Included: 36" finished chest circumference, 40" finished chest circumference, 44" finished chest circumference, 48" finished chest circumference, 52" finished chest circumference, 56" finished chest circumference, 60" finished chest circumference, 64" finished chest measurement
Needle / Hook Sizes: U.S. size D/3 (3.25 mm) crochet hook

title: Ebb + Flow Dishclothby Jenny Konopinski
description: Expanding and contracting, the Ebb + Flow Dishcloth uses simple single crochet stitches with intermittent crossed double crochets to create a unique wave effect. Use two contrasting colors or experiment with an ombre or wave of rainbow hues to ripple across this easy-to-memorize dishcloth.

title: Eclipse Cowlby Lion Brand
description: The Eclipse Cowl is a knit cowl pattern made with super bulky weight yarn that has a skill level of easy.

title: Edelweiss Earwarmerby Zara Powter
description: A rhythmic, relaxation piece, this earwarmer is designed to help you unwind and is covered in delicate flowers for a hint of luxury. The Edelweiss Earwarmer is a long rectangular headband, just wide enough to cover and warm your ears with a simple jasmine stitch pattern that repeats throughout the piece, and a single crochet edging added at the end.

title: Edith Wrapby Elly Doyle
description: This wrap hugs the shoulders for cozy, stylish comfort. Work in a bright color and pair with a Little Black Dress for a pop of eye-catching elegance. The wrap is worked flat and then sewn into a tube with a half-twist. Aggressive blocking opens up the stitches adding a further lacy effect to the fabric.

Each of the four pieces begins at one corner, and mitered squares are crocheted directly onto the existing work. Made with simple single crochet mitered squares and finished off with a darker border, the Hue Shift Afghan is a deceptively simple pattern that explores color in a new and creative way! Note: Working at gauge, a single color square will use 10 grams of yarn. Each color is used for 1 single color square and 18 additional squares where it is paired with another color. This means each of the 10 main body colors will use all 100 grams of the skein. We have suggested an additional skein for each color, to make sure the entire pattern can be completed.

title: Huntington Carryallby Two of Wands
description: Tote all of your essentials with this sophisticated hobo style bag. Sport it as a daily oversized purse, a carry-on for your distant travels, or a weekender for your next road trip.

title: Intention Blanketby Kate Miller
description: Harmonic juxtaposition resonates in this high-vibe throw that balances stability, delicacy, comfort, and beauty for relaxation and meditation. The Intention Blanket is a woven-look, single-piece throw, made in single crochet stitches over a contrasting color yarn held double and carried throughout.

title: Invigorating Face Scrubby Setby Amy Kate Sutherland
description: This spa set is perfect for anyone who's looking to replace disposable makeup remover wipes, or add a bit of handmade luxury to their daily cleansing routine. The Bubble Face Scrubbies are worked in the round and feature the cutest bubble stitches. The basket is also created in the round and is made primarily of single crochet to ensure durability. The basket is finished off with a round of the bubble stitches to bring the entire set together! One skein of CotLin will make 1 basket & 4 face scrubbies
Sizes Included: Basket: 3.5" diameter x 2" tall, Face Scrubbers: 2.75" diameter

title: Jade Dishclothby Lauren Robinson
description: Tapestry crochet made easy with a delightfully fun dishcloth pattern. YARN Dishie™ (Worsted, 100% cotton, 190yds/100g): C1 Butterscotch 29502; 1 skein C2 Jalapeño 25785; 1 skein

title: Jewel Box Shellby Kristen Clay
description: Casual and comfortable, this top is as easy to make as it is to wear. The simple openwork lace fabric can be dressed up or down depending on your day. Use simple buttons at the shoulder seam for a subtle style or add a bright jeweled button for a bit of bling.
Sizes Included: 33.5" finished chest measurement, 36.5" finished chest measurement, 40" finished chest measurement, 46.5" finished chest measurement, 49.5" finished chest measurement, 56" finished chest measurement, 59.5" finished chest measurement, 62.5" finished chest measurement, 69" finished chest measurement

title: Joyous Jar Wrapby Nicole Chase
description: Never tire of your holiday decorations with this Interchangeable Jar Wrap. With multiple ornament options, you can easily change the look of the wrap within seconds. The Joyous Jar Wrap is a simple design with a button added for attaching the varying ornaments. Ornaments are created in an applique style with a buttonhole on the back of each for an easy swap.

title: Kaleidoscope Ponchoby Two of Wands
description: The Kaleidoscope Poncho is worked flat from the top down in back-and-forth rows. Turn at the end of each row. To change color, work the final yarn over of the previous stitch with the new color. The poncho is reversible, and the collar can be worn with the ribbing facing out or facing in to show when folded over. Pattern is written for three sizes: XS/S/M (L/XL/2XL, 3XL/4XL). Some colors used in the sample are not available on the WeCrochet website. We have made some substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder below. title: Kalie Wrapby Katy Petersen
description: The Kallie Wrap is more than just a crochet wrap; it is a warm hug made with love. This wrap can be worn draped simply over the shoulders or wrapped around the neck like a scarf. This simple yet elegant wrap is sure to make a great gift this holiday season! The Kallie Wrap is a simple pattern that uses single crochet and double crochet worked in the front loop to create a pretty texture that looks more complicated than it is.

title: Keighley Loom Blanketby Kathleen Berlew
description: A simple stitch pattern that mimics the look and feel of a woven textile gives this blanket subtle texture and beautiful drape that make it perfect for autumn cuddling. Lush fringe tassels add a touch of fun. The Loom Blanket is a rectangular design worked flat in rows from one long edge. The Single Crochet/Chain-1 woven stitch pattern is worked in 7-row repeats that are separated by a single row of Double Crochet filet. Fringe tassels accent the blanket's short edges.

title: Kiskeya Tankby Elisabeth Desamour
description: The Kiskeya Tank is named after the title given to the island of Haïti by the Taínos people meaning “Mother of all lands.” This top will stand out in your wardrobe with its beautiful flowing leaf pattern and flattering shape. This pattern is worked flat, and the leaf pattern is created through a 6-row repetition. All sizes start by creating two body panels, and then to achieve size differences, some will work a panel of SC to join the front and back panels together. The color used in the sample is no longer available. We have made substitution suggestions in the Kit Builder.
Sizes Included: 33"  finished chest measurement, 40" finished chest measurement, 46" finished chest measurement, 53" finished chest measurement, 59" finished chest measurement, 66" finished chest measurement, 72" finished chest circumference

title: Kuumba Mug Rugsby Katie Grantham
description: Brighten up your living room and style your coffee mug with a bright mosaic crochet coaster. Named after the Kwanzaa ideal of Creativity, the Kuumba Mug Rug is a modern-looking coaster perfect for any home. Whip up a set for a quick last-minute gift! The Kuumba Mug Rug is a mosaic square worked from the bottom up in rows. The pattern is 20 stitches wide and 22 rows long, with fringe on both sides to complete the look.

title: Lacy Scarfby Lion Brand
description: The Lacy Scarf is a crochet scarf pattern made with super bulky weight yarn that has a skill level of easy. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Large Bag (Knit Crochet)by Lion Brand
description: The Large Bag is a knit & crochet pattern made with jumbo weight yarn that has a skill level of easy. To support our Independent Designers , this pattern is excluded from promotions.

title: Lark Lace Earringsby Sara Korth
description: Nothing says summer like bright, fun crochet! Inspired by sunshine peeking up over the horizon first thing in the morning, these earrings mirror the hopeful atmosphere of summertime and are the perfect summer accessory! The Lark Lace Earrings uniquely combine beginner and intermediate stitches, making them the perfect introduction to working with crochet thread and a small hook! The short, delicate pattern will expand your crochet skills and will work up satisfyingly quick.

title: Lattice Lace Shawlby Nicole Chase
description: Inspired by the trellis in a spring garden, the Lattice Lace Shawl gives a look of casual elegance. With an intricate lace design and delicate fringe, this shawl is the perfect addition to any spring wardrobe. The Lattice Lace Shawl is a long rectangular wrap worked flat from the short end. The 6-row repeat is worked continuously with a simple fringe added to each short end.

title: Le Toteby Mimi Alelis
description: This fashionable, soft yet sturdy tote is a great choice for day trips - carry your basic essentials for the beach, your crafty projects, or your grocery items. Tote bag is worked in two identical parts for front and back, then assembled with crochet. It starts with a circular shoulder strap, worked separately. The ribbed part is folded lengthwise over the strap, then the edges crocheted together. Body is made of Half Double Crochet worked in-between the posts of previous row. It is rounded at the bottom ends

title: Leaflet Wall Hangingby Kristen Clay
description: Bring the tropics into your d écor with a few basic stitches that create this unique, asymmetrical wall hanging featuring a single bold monstera leaf and slanted fringe. Worked in rows, following a filet chart, the wall hanging decreases by one block each row to create the slanted shape without any complicated decrease stitches.
Sizes Included: 21" wide x 24" long, not including fringe
Needle / Hook Sizes: U.S. size G (4.25 mm) crochet hook

title: Lemon Block Pattern - Warm Up Americaby Twinkie Chan
description: When life gives you lemons ¦ crochet one! #StitchAwayStress this April by crocheting a cute lemon blanket block for your donation to Warm Up America and bring awareness to National Stress Awareness Month. This is a fun project that you'll crochet with some basic colorwork or intarsia. Intarsia comes from a German word meaning “mosaic”, and the fun thing about intarsia is that it looks great from the front and the back. All you need to know is the single crochet stitch!

title: Liana Vines Topby Liz Salazar
description: Entangle yourself in the twisting, turning, and climbing stems of the Liana Vines Top. Inspired by the lush greenery and tropical climate of the rainforest, this v-neck style top, with its cascading greenery appliqué, is sure to become the hottest addition to your summer wardrobe. Liana Vines Top is worked in four separate panels, and then seamed together. Leaf appliqué are worked individually before being sewn on, prior to seaming. Surface slip stitch is used to create the stems. Panels are worked from bottom up in HDC v-st pattern.
Sizes Included: 35.5" finished chest, 40" finished chest, 45" finished chest, 47" finished chest, 52.5" finished chest, 55" finished chest, 60.5" finished chest, 64" finished chest

title: Light Touch Pulloverby Natasha Robarge
description: This lightweight pullover exudes softness and feminine charm, featuring a subtle lace pattern composed of petal clusters. Open neck, gentle pattern curves, relaxed fit, and cashmere content of the yarn, all create a luxurious garment. Light Touch Pullover is worked sideways in pieces. Front and Back are worked from centerlines to sides. Sleeves are worked from bottom up. This construction allows easy size adjustments if needed. A reduced stitch diagram is provided for front neck shaping. Light Touch Pullover is worked sideways in pieces. Front and Back are worked from centerlines to sides. Sleeves are worked from bottom up. This construction allows easy size adjustments, if needed. A reduced stitch diagram is provided for front neck shaping. garment is meant to be worn with 4" of ease
